home.description: We are a community-driven youth club dedicated to making a positive impact in our village through volunteering, sports, and solidarity.

project.title: Making an Impact
project.subtitle: See the difference we make in our community.
project.description: Our first major initiative was restoring the village volleyball court. What started as an overgrown, unusable space was transformed back into a vibrant spot for youth sports and gatherings.
project.cta: See the full story and more of our community efforts.

footer.description: Together We Rise. A community-driven youth club dedicated to making a positive impact in our village.

about.title: About NextGen Youth
about.subtitle: Discover who we are, why we started, and where we're going.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To empower the youth of our village by fostering a strong sense of community, encouraging volunteerism, and organizing activities that promote physical, mental, and social well-being.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A united, active, and thriving village where every young person has the opportunity to contribute, grow, and lead. We believe that by working together, we can build a brighter future for everyone.

why_formed.title: Why We Formed the Club
why_formed.text: Recognizing a lack of organized activities and spaces for the youth in our village, a group of passionate individuals came together. We wanted to create a platform where young people could channel their energy positively, support local initiatives, and build lifelong friendships.

story.title: Our Founding Story
story.p1: It all started with a simple conversation at the village square. A few of us were talking about how the old volleyball court had fallen into disrepair and how there weren't many opportunities for us to gather and do something meaningful.
story.p2_1: That conversation sparked an idea: what if we formed a club dedicated to improving our community? Word spread quickly, and our first official meeting exceeded all expectations. The energy in the room was palpable.
story.p2_2: became our natural motto, reflecting our belief that collective action is the key to creating lasting change.
story.p3: Today, NextGen Youth is a growing family, and we are just getting started.

activities.title: Activities & Projects | NextGen Youth
activities.description: Explore the ongoing activities, meetings, and community projects of NextGen Youth.

meetings.section_subtitle: Catch up on our regular gatherings where we discuss community issues, plan events, and strengthen our bonds.

items.title: First Monthly Meeting
items.description: Our very first gathering where community members came together to outline our vision, elect committee members, and propose initial projects for the village.

items.title: Second Monthly Meeting
items.description: Focused heavily on planning the Volleyball Court Cleaning Campaign. We coordinated volunteers, secured necessary equipment, and set action timelines.

items.title: Third Monthly Meeting
items.description: A celebratory meeting to review the success of our first community project and discuss upcoming initiatives including charity events and youth sports tournaments.

projects.section_subtitle: See the real-world impact we are making in our village.

featured.title: Volleyball Court Cleaning Campaign
featured.p1: For years, the village volleyball court was a central hub for youth activities. However, due to lack of maintenance, it became overgrown with weeds and unusable. Seeing this loss to our community, NextGen Youth organized a massive cleaning campaign.
featured.p2: Over 20 volunteers showed up early on a weekend morning armed with tools. We cleared the weeds, repaired the nets, painted the lines, and restored the court to its former glory.
featured.impact_quote: "The volleyball court is now actively used by local youth every evening. It has brought life back to this part of the village and provided a safe, healthy environment for our teenagers."

gallery.title: Gallery | NextGen Youth
gallery.description: A collection of photos from the meetings, projects, and activities of NextGen Youth.
gallery.page_subtitle: Explore the moments we've shared making our community a better place.

contact.title: Contact Us | NextGen Youth
contact.description: Get in touch with NextGen Youth. We'd love to hear from you.
contact.page_subtitle: Interested in joining us or have a community project idea? We'd love to hear from you.
